leg001.name: Aelindra the Unyielding
leg001.abilityText: Your Units gain +1 might while Aelindra is in play. Once per turn, you may draw a card when a friendly Unit defeats an enemy.

leg002.name: Korroth the Ashen
leg002.abilityText: Enemy Units enter play with -1 might. At the start of your turn, deal 1 damage to each enemy Unit.

chm001.name: Seraphyn Dawnblade
chm001.abilityText: When Seraphyn enters the battlefield, all friendly Units gain Swift until end of turn. Level up: deal 3 damage to target enemy.

chm002.name: Valdros Ironmantle
chm002.abilityText: Valdros has Ward 2. Level up: give target friendly Unit +2 might and Armor until end of turn.

btf001.name: The Verdant Hollow
btf001.abilityText: At the start of each player's turn, that player gains 1 energy. Units with the Forest keyword gain +1 might here.

btf002.name: Cinderpeak Volcano
btf002.abilityText: When any Unit attacks here, deal 1 damage to it. Units with the Fire keyword ignore this damage.

btf003.name: Stormreach Cliffs
btf003.abilityText: Ranged Units have +2 might here. Melee Units may not attack across this battlefield without paying 1 power.

btf004.name: The Sunken Archives
btf004.abilityText: Whenever a player plays a Spell, they may scry 1. Units here cannot use activated abilities.

btf005.name: Ironhaven Fortress
btf005.abilityText: Your Units defending here gain Armor. The defending player may block with one additional Unit.

btf006.name: Moonveil Crossing
btf006.abilityText: Units with Shadow keyword are invisible here until they attack. At nightfall, all Units gain +1 might.

rne001.name: Rune of Ember
rne001.abilityText: Add 2 energy to your pool. If you have a Fire unit in play, draw a card instead.

rne002.name: Rune of Gale
rne002.abilityText: Target friendly Unit gains Swift this turn. If it attacks, it may attack again.

rne003.name: Rune of Stone
rne003.abilityText: Give target Unit Armor until end of turn. That Unit may not be targeted by spells this turn.

rne004.name: Rune of Shadow
rne004.abilityText: Target enemy Unit loses all keywords until end of turn. Draw a card.

rne005.name: Rune of Restoration
rne005.abilityText: Heal target Unit for 3. If that Unit's might is 3 or less, fully restore it.

rne006.name: Rune of the Pact
rne006.abilityText: Both players draw 2 cards. You gain 2 power.

rne007.name: Rune of Fury
rne007.abilityText: All friendly Units gain +2 might and Frenzy until end of turn.

rne008.name: Rune of Warding
rne008.abilityText: Counter target Spell or Gear ability. Gain 1 energy.

rne009.name: Rune of Seeking
rne009.abilityText: Search your deck for any card, reveal it, put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck.

rne010.name: Rune of the Fallen
rne010.abilityText: Return target Unit from your discard pile to play. It gains Haste.

unt001.name: Ashguard Sentinel
unt001.abilityText: Armor. When Ashguard Sentinel blocks, it takes no damage from enemies with might 2 or less.

unt002.name: Verdant Ranger
unt002.abilityText: Ranged. Swift. Verdant Ranger may attack any enemy Unit on the battlefield, not just adjacent ones.

unt003.name: Emberkin Pyromancer
unt003.abilityText: Fire. When Emberkin Pyromancer attacks, deal 1 damage to all enemies at target battlefield.

unt004.name: Ironveil Knight
unt004.abilityText: When Ironveil Knight enters play, give a friendly Unit +1 might until end of turn.

unt005.name: Moonwhisper Rogue
unt005.abilityText: Shadow. Moonwhisper Rogue is invisible until it attacks. When it damages an enemy, draw a card.

unt006.name: Stoneback Behemoth
unt006.abilityText: Trample. Stoneback Behemoth deals excess combat damage to the defending player.

unt007.name: Galewing Scout
unt007.abilityText: Swift. When Galewing Scout enters play, scry 2.

unt008.name: Thornweald Guardian
unt008.abilityText: Forest. Ward 1. When an enemy targets Thornweald Guardian, it gains +1 might until end of turn.

unt009.name: Crestfall Duelist
unt009.abilityText: First Strike. Crestfall Duelist deals combat damage before non-First Strike units.

unt010.name: Ashen Revenant
unt010.abilityText: Undying. When Ashen Revenant would be destroyed, return it to your hand instead (once per game).

unt011.name: Drifting Specter
unt011.abilityText: Shadow. Ranged. Drifting Specter cannot be blocked by Units without the Shadow keyword.

unt012.name: Brightscale Drake
unt012.abilityText: Flying. Brightscale Drake can only be blocked by other Flying units.

unt013.name: Ironroot Elder
unt013.abilityText: Forest. At the start of your turn, gain 1 energy for each other Forest Unit you control.

unt014.name: Wavecaller Adept
unt014.abilityText: When Wavecaller Adept enters play, draw a card if you control three or more Units.

unt015.name: Flamecrest Warlord
unt015.abilityText: Fire. Frenzy. When Flamecrest Warlord attacks and destroys an enemy, it may attack again.

gea001.name: Warplate Harness
gea001.abilityText: Equip to a Unit (cost 1 energy). Equipped Unit gains +2 might and Armor.

gea002.name: Shadowcloak Shroud
gea002.abilityText: Equip to a Unit. Equipped Unit gains the Shadow keyword and +1 might.

gea003.name: Stormbow
gea003.abilityText: Equip to a Unit. Equipped Unit gains Ranged and +1 might. Activated: deal 2 damage to any target (cost 2 energy).

gea004.name: Thornbinder Totem
gea004.abilityText: At the start of your turn, all enemies take 1 damage. Enemies with might 3 or more take 2 damage instead.

spl001.name: Flash of Brilliance
spl001.abilityText: Draw 2 cards. If you have fewer cards in hand than your opponent, draw 3 instead.

spl002.name: Searing Bolt
spl002.abilityText: Deal 3 damage to target Unit or player.

spl003.name: Veil of Nightfall
spl003.abilityText: All enemy Units lose all keywords until end of turn. Your Shadow Units gain +2 might until end of turn.

spl004.name: Earthshatter Quake
spl004.abilityText: Deal 2 damage to all Units. Units with might 2 or less are destroyed.

spl005.name: Champion's Rally
spl005.abilityText: All friendly Units gain +2 might and Haste until end of turn. Draw a card.

spl006.name: Arcane Severance
spl006.abilityText: Counter target Spell. The opponent discards a card.
